stages.name: public_docs_doctest
stages.evidence: selected public contract docs (CLI_SPEC, CONFIG_SPEC, REPORT_FORMAT, DOCTEST_AI_INTEGRATION) execute through zentinel doctest: the CLI version case, the config example, the report JSON subset example, and the doctest AI JSON subset example all pass.

residual_risk: Public-docs doctest evidence is referenced from the verifier artifact via the public_docs_doctest stage so doctest coverage is auditable; JSON examples are validated as supported subsets, not full schema validation.
